headline: A Look At Albertsons Companies (ACI) Valuation As Tech Leader Brian Rice Joins The Board
summary: Albertsons Companies (ACI) shares are in focus after the retailer expanded its board to 11 members and added Brian Rice, a veteran technology leader currently serving as Global CIO at McDonald’s Corporation. See our latest analysis for Albertsons Companies. The board appointment comes as Albertsons Companies trades at US$17.77, with a 1 day share price return of 2.72% contrasting with a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 14.62%. This suggests recent momentum has picked up after a...

headline: Activist Starboard Takes Big Stake in French-Fry Maker Lamb Weston
summary: Starboard Value is pushing the company to speed up improvements and cost cutting to boost its underperforming stock.

headline: 30-year-old chain closing all 28 restaurants in April
summary: A very large brand often has trouble growing new concepts because the growth path to making a meaningful impact on the bottom line seems impossible. headline: McDonald’s shuts down wild burger rumor
summary: McDonald's faces a lot of jokes about the quality of its hamburgers. Some critiques come from celebrity chefs. "Strip a Big Mac back of everything it's filled up with, and you've got two bland basics: fat and fodder," Gordon Ramsay told The Takeout. "When you think of how exciting it is to make a ...

headline: Does Brian Rice’s Board Appointment Reveal a Deeper Digital Ambition at Albertsons (ACI)?
summary: Albertsons Companies, Inc. recently appointed Brian Rice, Executive Vice President and Global Chief Information Officer at McDonald’s Corporation, to its Board of Directors, expanding the board to 11 members as of February 25, 2026. By adding a global technology leader with deep experience in digital transformation, data, and cybersecurity, Albertsons is reinforcing its push toward more advanced, digitally enabled retail and supply chain operations. We’ll now explore how Brian Rice’s...
